Write a 180-220 word abstract for a hypothetical paper titled "Failure modes of LLM-driven workflow orchestration: a four-pattern study".

Context: This paper studies four practical patterns for LLM-driven workflow orchestration (parallel thinking, iterate-until-acceptable, propose-review-judge-implement, and fan-out-then-anonymized-review).

Acceptance criteria (the judge must score against these and cite which items are unmet in feedback):
  1. Names at least three concrete failure modes.
  2. Gives at least one example per mode.
  3. Is between 180 and 220 words.
  4. Does not use marketing language. Banned terms: leverage, powerful, cutting-edge, transformative, revolutionize, synergy, optimal.

Write the abstract in plain prose. No section headings, no bullet lists, no preface, no title.
